# nayatel_volume_attachment (Resource)

Attaches a volume to an instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nayatel_volume" "data" {
  name = "app-data"
  size = 50
}

resource "nayatel_volume_attachment" "data" {
  volume_id   = nayatel_volume.data.id
  instance_id = nayatel_instance.web.id
}

output "device" {
  value = nayatel_volume_attachment.data.device
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) ID of the instance to attach the volume to
- `volume_id` (String) ID of the volume to attach

### Read-Only

- `device` (String) The device path of the attached volume (e.g., /dev/vdb)
- `id` (String) Attachment identifier (volume_id:instance_id)
## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Imported as <volume_id>:<instance_id>
terraform import nayatel_volume_attachment.data <volume_id>:<instance_id>
```
